Req.Code:
curl --request POST \
--url https://api-singapore.klingai.com/v1/images/generations \
--header 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data '{
"model_name": "kling-v2-1",
"prompt": "Generate a Pixar-style puppy",
"negative_prompt": "",
"image": "https://p1-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-qa-test/dog.png",
"n": 2,
"external_task_id": "",
"callback_url": ""
}'

Headers.Name: Authorization
Headers.Description: Authentication information, refer to API authentication

Body.Name: image_fidelity
Body.Description: Face reference intensity for user-uploaded images during generation

Body.Name: human_fidelity
Body.Description: Facial reference intensity, refers to the similarity of the facial features of the person in the reference image

Body.Name: element_list
Body.Description: Reference element list based on element library ID

Body.Name: aspect_ratio
Body.Description: Aspect ratio of the generated images (width:height)

Body.Name: watermark_info
Body.Description: Whether to generate watermarked results simultaneously

Body.Name: callback_url
Body.Description: The callback notification address for the result of this task. If configured, the server will actively notify when the task status changes.

Comments.code: // Error codes; specific definitions see Error codes
Comments.data.created_at: // Task creation time, Unix timestamp, ms
Comments.data.task_id: // Task ID, generated by the system
Comments.data.task_status: // Task status: submitted, processing, succeed, failed
Comments.data.updated_at: // Task update time, Unix timestamp, ms
Comments.request_id: // Request ID, generated by the system, for tracking and troubleshooting

PathParams.Name: task_id
PathParams.Description: The task ID for image generation. Request path parameter, directly fill the value in the request path.

PathParams.Name: external_task_id
PathParams.Description: Customized Task ID for audio generation

Headers.Name: Authorization
Headers.Description: Authentication information, refer to API authentication

Comments.code: // Error codes; Specific definitions can be found in Error codes
Comments.data.created_at: // Task creation time, Unix timestamp, unit ms
Comments.data.task_id: // Task ID, generated by the system
Comments.data.task_result.images.url: // URL for generating images, such as: https://h1.inkwai.com/bs2/upload-ylab-stunt/1fa0ac67d8ce6cd55b50d68b967b3a59.png(To ensure information security, generated images/videos will be cleared after 30 days. Please make sure to save them promptly.)
Comments.data.task_result.images.watermark_url: // Watermarked image download URL, anti-leech format
Comments.data.task_status: // Task status, Enum values: submitted, processing, succeed, failed
Comments.data.task_status_msg: // Task status information, displaying the failure reason when the task fails (such as triggering the content risk control of the platform, etc.)
Comments.data.updated_at: // Task update time, Unix timestamp, unit ms
Comments.request_id: // Request ID, generated by the system, is used to track requests and troubleshoot problems
